summary: Independent read-only QA accepted the RR1 controlled task graph at 030e5315cb04a967b1ae89b494f31e733a4b5682. The graph contains exactly seven RR1 child task files, all DRAFT. The parent task is REVIEW, routes to qa_reviewer, and binds systems_review_commit 542b0761168d2b3f5d06bff758fa4f5eb823ccab. Dependencies are acyclic and conservative: current taskctl ready is empty, and simulated parent closure makes only RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 dependency-ready. Scope proof shows no product code, packages, tests, content, CI, dependency, docs/29, or historical Gate files changed in origin/main..HEAD. R1 task contracts cover the required production Worker lifecycle, command/query/preview/submit authority, read-model deltas, authoritative time controls, save/load/restart, crash recovery, browser/Node parity, negative command behavior, fixture/no-op replacement, and exit evidence.

No output; current ready list is empty.

decisions.decision: Accept the process-only RR1 task graph. It does not start R1 implementation and it keeps all seven child implementation/exit tasks DRAFT until Lead integration.
The only dependency-ready child after parent closure on origin/main should be RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001.
Task contracts preserve R1 runtime gaps as implementation work and require production evidence rather than fixture, local-success, canary, Storybook, or test-only substitution.

risks.summary: goal-mode-state.json, model-routing-state.json, GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION.json, and thread-registry.json still show the systems_architect start route as active_writing_task_graph / START_ROUTE_SENT. This does not invalidate the task graph because the parent task itself is REVIEW with route_to qa_reviewer and the user provided the current QA route in-thread, but Lead should reconcile persisted route/thread state when recording QA and before closing the graph.
Normal Web/Electron still lack authoritative Worker runtime wiring; this is correctly preserved as R1 implementation scope, not hidden as completed behavior.
Save/load/restart crosses Electron preload and filesystem boundaries; RR1-SAVE-LOAD-RESTART-001 correctly requires security_reviewer, systems_architect, and qa_reviewer.
Protected M7 worktree remains retained non-operational evidence with exactly 20 pre-existing status entries.

requested_action: Record this QA ACCEPT handoff, reconcile persisted route/thread state for the completed systems review and current QA review, then run Lead integration gates. Do not start RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 or any R1 implementation until the accepted RR1 task graph is integrated into origin/main and RR1-TASK-GRAPH-001 is properly closed.
